title: Alias Overloading
description: Server allows alias overloading which can bypass rate limits
impact: Attackers can send batched queries with aliases to exfiltrate data or DoS the server

title: Batch Query Support
description: Server supports batched queries without proper rate limiting
impact: May lead to resource exhaustion attacks

title: Field Suggestions
description: Server provides field suggestions in error messages
impact: Information disclosure that aids attackers in schema discovery

title: Missing CSRF Protection
description: GraphQL endpoint does not enforce CSRF tokens
impact: Attackers can perform state-changing mutations via CSRF
